spec.description: Path to the arm-neutral behavioral spec (spec.md). The ONLY task statement either arm sees.

path.description: Arm-shared held-out test directory. One suite, two runners; per-arm test authorship is prohibited.

heldOut.description: Held-out tests are never shown to the agent under test.

toolkit.description: C# arm always gets Roslyn analyzers + NRT + freedom to generate its own evidence (gates doc §1).

config.description: Must match the gates-doc §1 pin; runs violating it are invalid.

parity.description: Structural parity record (gates doc §3.3): decl count and cyclomatic-complexity sum within ±30% across arms.

wedgeWhitelistCheck.description: REQUIRED for W1-W5: statement that intended contracts fall inside docs/verification-modeled-forms.md, and (W3+) that effect boundaries are manifest-covered. Checked at authoring.

iterationBudget.description: Pinned by the gates doc §2 — per-pair budget choice would move censoring points (a quiet knob). Any deviation must be pre-registered with rationale before the suite freeze, which requires changing this schema.

timeoutSeconds.description: Task-level timeout. A timeout mid-iteration fails that iteration (gates doc §2). Per-pair values must be set before freeze; not adjustable afterward.
